Text:
The standard rate at which 0% contamination water erodes the terrain per 1m³/s.
1%/day means a tile will fully collapse after 50 days under constant 1m³/s water flow.

The rate of erosion for water with 100% contamination.
Any water with contamination between 0% and 100% will have an erosion rate between the standard and badwater rates scaled linearly.

The threshold of erosion that a land tile becomes a Blockage.
Blockage then becomes ¾ blockage, then ½ blockage, then ¼ blockage, and finally fully eroded at linearly scaled thresholds after the initial blockage threshold.
